news.paragraph: Zoom Communications has recently faced downward pressure, with the stock falling more steeply than the broader market. This price action is accompanied by news of an insider reducing their stake by 100%. While the company is undergoing an AI push and leadership changes, no immediate earnings or regulatory catalysts are noted in the current headlines.
headlines: Cathie Wood Bets On Kalshi, But Her Ark Innovation ETF Hasn't Been Great At Timing Winners
